goals: Explore available unit conversion categories to understand what measurements are supported
Convert data storage units commonly used in cryptographic solution analysis
Convert measurement units for presenting economic research data in different formats

user_agent_config.personality: Analytical and methodical, prefers gathering information systematically before performing calculations for research purposes.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands economic research and cryptographic concepts but has no knowledge of unit conversion tools or APIs. Needs to discover available options and perform conversions for data presentation.

end_condition: The user has explored available conversion categories and successfully converted the necessary units for their cryptographic solution analysis and economic data presentation.
